entries.name: LivenessModule
entries.description: used to remove members inactive for 3mo 8d while making sure that the threshold remains above 75%. If the number of members falls below 8, the eth:0x847B5c174615B1B7fDF770882256e2D3E95b9D92 takes ownership of the multisig

receivedPermissions.description: can remove members of eth:0xc2819DC788505Aac350142A7A707BF9D03E3Bd03 inactive for 3mo 8d.

entries.name: AddressManager
entries.description: Legacy contract used to manage a mapping of string names to addresses. Modern OP stack uses a different standard proxy system instead, but this contract is still necessary for backwards compatibility with several older contracts.

directlyReceivedPermissions.condition: if the number of eth:0xc2819DC788505Aac350142A7A707BF9D03E3Bd03 members falls below 8.

entries.name: AddressManager
